title: Visiting Family in Tucson
summary:
We had initially been planning to visit my family in Tucson for Thanksgiving and decided to move up our arrival date when the forecast in Northern Arizona showed nothing but rain and cold. We had a very nice and relaxing time visiting my family in Tucson. My dad helped Helen and I put the finishing touches on our van build. We added a little step that covered the heater duct, a fold out table at the end of our counter, and a windowsill that covered a number of miscellaneous cables. We also updated our propane system so that it supplied propane to both our stove and our water heater, and used a solenoid to control the flow of gas. This ended up being a more involved process than expected and featured many trips to Ace Hardware and a number of expletives. Luckily, we were able to get it working, and now get to press a fancy button before using our stove!

-Colin

photos.caption: Maya hanging out on the couch with Colin's parent's dogs, Sasha and Keeley.
